description.s: Handles /sync POST requests from mobile devices. Applies incoming items with last-write-wins, collects local changes and deletions since the requested timestamp, and responds. Pure Hobson — no Tauri knowledge.

attachBlob.name: attachBlob
attachBlob.description: Attach blob data (as base64 data URL) to an item for transit, if one exists.

acceptItem.name: acceptItem
acceptItem.description: Accept an incoming item: store its blob (if any) and return the clean item.

storeBlob.name: storeBlob
storeBlob.description: Store a transit blob without modifying the item (for defensive LWW path).
